text: BREAKING: Iran says it won’t attend Wednesday’s talks in Pakistan. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 突发：伊朗表示不会参加周三在巴基斯坦举行的会谈。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: 🇮🇷 BREAKING! Iran Pulls Out of Wednesday Islamabad Talks — Tasnim News Iran has formally notified the United States through Pakistani mediators that it will not attend Wednesday's scheduled negotiations in Islamabad, with no timeline set for future rounds, according to Tasnim News Agency. The decision follows what Tehran describes as a pattern of American bad faith since the ceasefire framework was agreed upon. According to Tasnim's sources, Iran accepted a ceasefire and subsequent negotiations based on a 10-point framework it submitted — which Washington formally accepted through Pakistani intermediaries. However, the U.S. almost immediately began walking back its commitments. First, Washington failed to pressure Israel into implementing the Lebanon ceasefire as agreed — stalling talks for several days. Then, during the first Islamabad round, the U.S. introduced demands that far exceeded the original framework, effectively torpedoing the negotiations. Tehran's assessment: having failed on the battlefield, Washington was trying to compensate through maximalist demands at the table. Iran subsequently issued a firm warning of missile strikes on Israel, which Tasnim says forced the U.S. to finally operationalize the Lebanon ceasefire. Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi then announced Tehran would reopen the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping in line with the initial framework — only for the U.S. to continue its naval blockade regardless. Recent message exchanges produced no meaningful progress, with Washington refusing to retreat from demands Tehran considers violations of Iran's sovereign rights. Iran has now concluded that returning to talks under these conditions would be a waste of time, as the U.S. is blocking any viable agreement. The decision has been communicated to Washington via Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 突发！伊朗退出周三伊斯兰堡会谈 — 塔斯尼姆通讯社 据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗已通过巴基斯坦调解人正式通知美国，其将不会参加原定于周三在伊斯兰堡举行的谈判，且未设定未来几轮谈判的时间表。此前，德黑兰称自停火框架达成以来，美国一直表现出不诚意。据塔斯尼姆的消息来源，伊朗基于其提交的10点框架接受了停火及后续谈判——华盛顿通过巴基斯坦中间人正式接受了该框架。然而，美国几乎立即开始背弃承诺。首先，华盛顿未能向以色列施压以落实已达成的黎巴嫩停火协议，导致谈判停滞数日。随后，在伊斯兰堡的第一轮谈判中，美国提出的要求远远超出了最初的框架，实际上破坏了谈判。德黑兰的评估是：华盛顿在战场上失败后，试图通过在谈判桌上提出极端要求来弥补。随后，伊朗发出了导弹袭击以色列的严厉警告，塔斯尼姆称这迫使美国最终落实了黎巴嫩停火协议。伊朗外交部长阿拉格希随后宣布，德黑兰将按照最初框架重新开放霍尔木兹海峡供商业航运——但美国仍继续实施海军封锁。近期的信息交流未取得任何实质性进展，华盛顿拒绝撤回德黑兰认为侵犯其主权权利的要求。伊朗现已得出结论，在这些条件下重返谈判是浪费时间，因为美国正在阻碍任何可行的协议。该决定已通过伊斯兰堡传达给华盛顿。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Tasnim: Iran's decision to not attend talks in Pakistan this Wednesday is final. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗决定不参加本周三在巴基斯坦举行的会谈，此决定是最终决定。 @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @: "While Vance could still leave later in the week, possibly as soon as Tuesday evening, President Trump is privately discussing canceling the trip altogether, one person said, citing Tehran’s unwillingness to concede to his demands on nuclear enrichment. Another person said the decision was made because Iran wouldn't commit to meeting." https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-israel-us-strait-hormuz-2026/card/vance-pauses-trip-to-pakistan-for-iran-talks-GREfTsAXPSJmaW2WXphN tweet

text: WarMonitor A new FOIA request is targeting FBI Director Kash Patel, looking for internal messages flagged with terms like “drunk,” “intoxicated,” “sleeping,” “unresponsive,” and “passed out.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046671975771164863/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一项新的《信息自由法》（FOIA）请求正针对联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔，旨在寻找标记有“醉酒”、“中毒”、“睡觉”、“无反应”和“昏迷”等词汇的内部信息。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046671975771164863/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : J. Edgar Boozer. “On multiple occasions in the past year, members of his security detail had difficulty waking Patel because he was seemingly intoxicated, according to information supplied to Justice Department and White House officials” https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/2026/04/kash-patel-fbi-director-drinking-absences/686839/?gift=SCYx-5scVta3-cr_IlgTyb86z5KwYZSxOvr9Dt6JNpg - Jonathan Lemire tweet

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s Ambassador to the United Nations Amir Saeid Iravani said Tuesday that the Iranian government has “received some signs” that the United States is preparing to lift its blockade against coastal areas and port in Iran, adding that as soon as Washington ends the blockade, “I think the next round of the negotiations will take place in Islamabad.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗驻联合国大使阿米尔·赛义德·伊拉瓦尼周二表示，伊朗政府已“收到一些迹象”，表明美国正准备解除对伊朗沿海地区和港口的封锁，并补充说，一旦华盛顿结束封锁，“我认为下一轮谈判将在伊斯兰堡举行。” 推文

He could still depart later in the week, possibly Tuesday evening (tonight). President Trump is also weighing canceling the trip entirely, with sources citing Tehran’s refusal to concede on nuclear enrichment and failure to commit to a meeting. tweet

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇱 Netanyahu's statements about eliminating the threat of a "nuclear Holocaust" are disrespectful to all victims of World War II. They substitute concepts and distort facts, Russian Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said. ℹ️ She was commenting on Netanyahu's remarks at Israel's Memorial Day ceremony at Mount Herzl in Jerusalem on Tuesday, in which he claimed that Iran had "planned another Holocaust" and that, had it not been stopped, Natanz, Fordow and Isfahan would have joined the ranks of Holocaust death camps: Auschwitz, Majdanek and Treblinka. Netanyahu framed the U.S.-Israeli military operation against Iran as having removed what he called an "immediate existential threat" to Israel, arguing the country had otherwise faced a catastrophe on the scale of the Holocaust. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇱 俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃表示，内塔尼亚胡关于消除“核大屠杀”威胁的言论是对所有二战受害者的不尊重。他们偷换概念并歪曲事实。 ℹ️ 她是在评论内塔尼亚胡周二在耶路撒冷赫茨尔山举行的以色列大屠杀纪念日仪式上的讲话，他在讲话中声称伊朗“策划了另一场大屠杀”，如果不是被阻止，纳坦兹、福尔多和伊斯法罕将加入奥斯威辛、马伊达内克和特雷布林卡等大屠杀死亡集中营的行列。内塔尼亚胡将美以针对伊朗的军事行动描述为消除了他所谓的对以色列的“直接生存威胁”，并辩称否则该国将面临大屠杀规模的灾难。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 📝 Хроника специальной военной операции 📝 за 21 апреля 2026 года 🧨 Российские войска сконцентрировали основные усилия на выведении из строя инфраструктуры противника в приграничной зоне Сумской , Черниговской и Харьковской областей . В Нежинском районе поражена подстанция, а в Богодухове местные жители сообщают о выводе из строя всех АЗС в городе и закрытии магазинов, а также массовом оттоке населения. Противник атаковал железнодорожную станцию в Персиановском Ростовской области , а также объекты в Самарской области . Вторую неделю продолжается налет дронов на освобожденную часть Запорожской области , а также населенные пункты ДНР . ➡️ На Слобожанском направлении российские войска продвигаются в приграничье Харьковской области . Бойцы ГВ «Север» перешли границу на еще одном участке и установили контроль над Ветеринарным и расположенными в его районе лесными массивами. ➡️ На Константиновском направлении штурмовики ведут зачистку опорных пунктов к северо-востоку от города в районе Новомарково . Бойцы Добровольческого корпуса выбили противника из укрепленных позиций, бои у которых продолжались последние месяцы. 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Обстановка в зоне специальной военной операции ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Слобожанское направление ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Константиновское направление ( ru ; en ) 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #Запорожье #карта #Россия #Самара #Украина #Харьков #Чернигов ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 特别军事行动纪事 📝 2026年4月21日 🧨 俄罗斯军队将主要精力集中在摧毁苏梅、切尔尼戈夫和哈尔科夫地区边境地带的敌方基础设施上。涅任区的一个变电站被击中，博戈杜霍夫当地居民报告称城内所有加油站瘫痪，商店关闭，人口大量外流。敌方袭击了罗斯托夫地区佩尔西亚诺夫斯基的火车站以及萨马拉地区的设施。针对扎波罗热解放区以及顿涅茨克人民共和国定居点的无人机袭击已持续两周。 ➡️ 在斯洛博然斯基方向，俄罗斯军队正在向哈尔科夫地区边境推进。“北方”部队战士越过边境进入另一个区域，并控制了韦捷里纳尔内及其周边森林地带。 ➡️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向，突击部队正在清理城市东北部新马尔科夫地区的据点。志愿军战士将敌方从其坚守数月的防御阵地中驱逐出去。 📎 高分辨率地图： 🔸 特别军事行动区局势 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 斯洛博然斯基方向 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向 ( ru ; en ) 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #扎波罗热 #地图 #俄罗斯 #萨马拉 #乌克兰 #哈尔科夫 #切尔尼戈夫 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱French President Macron reports that regional stability can only be achieved by the Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese territory and the disarmament of Hezbollah. "This sustainable stabilisation of Lebanon and the region will only be possible by…" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam thanked France for its efforts in supporting a ceasefire and disarmament, stating that Lebanon is facing a war imposed on it and did not choose. Salam said negotiations with Israel will be “arduous” and require effective international support, confirming that the diplomatic track will continue through direct talks. He added that Lebanon needs €500 million over the next six months to address the humanitarian crisis in the south, stressing that the priority is preparing for an international reconstruction conference, while noting that lasting stability requires Israeli withdrawal and the return of prisoners and displaced persons. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱法国总统马克龙表示，只有以色列从黎巴嫩领土撤军并解除真主党武装，才能实现地区稳定。‘黎巴嫩和该地区的可持续稳定只有在……的情况下才有可能实现’ ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆感谢法国为支持停火和解除武装所做的努力，并表示黎巴嫩面临的是一场强加于它且它并未选择的战争。萨拉姆称与以色列的谈判将是‘艰巨的’，需要有效的国际支持，并确认外交途径将通过直接会谈继续进行。他补充说，黎巴嫩在未来六个月内需要5亿欧元来应对南部的人道主义危机，强调当务之急是为国际重建会议做准备，同时指出持久的稳定需要以色列撤军以及被俘人员和流离失所者的回归。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇮🇷 🐻 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf with another based post on X - this time a poll on how the Orangetan Window Licker will sell the restart of the war to imperial pleb. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics： 🇮🇷 🐻 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫在X上又发布了一条基于事实的帖子——这次是一项关于那个“红毛猩猩舔窗者”（Orangetan Window Licker）将如何向帝国平民兜售重启战争的民意调查。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The commander of the IRGC Aerospace Force Brigadier General Majid Mousavi warned Iran’s southern neighbours that if their territory and facilities are used by enemies to attack Iran, “they should say goodbye to oil production in the Middle East." He added that if the enemy commits any aggression against Iran, “this time, wherever you [the Iranian people] say, our target will be." He also praised the nation for their continued presence in the streets, saying Iranian forces remain ready with their hands on the trigger even during the military quiet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队司令马吉德·穆萨维准将警告伊朗的南部邻国，如果他们的领土和设施被敌人用来攻击伊朗，“他们就应该告别中东的石油生产了。”他补充说，如果敌人对伊朗进行任何侵略，“这一次，无论你们（伊朗人民）说哪里，我们的目标就是哪里。”他还称赞了伊朗人民在街头的持续存在，称伊朗军队即使在军事平静期间也保持着随时待命的状态。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Fotros Resistance: "🇮🇷| IRGC Aerospace Commander, Seyed Majid, gives a strong warning: ‌Iran's southern neighbors should know that if their geography and facilities are used by the enemy to attack Iran, they must say goodbye to oil production in the Middle East region. Footage:…" 🇮🇷 For those of you who watched our Sunday stream and wondered where Chris was headed... Here is your answer, in his own words: "For the first time in 37 years, I am HOME in IRAN!" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Fotros Resistance：“🇮🇷| 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队司令赛义德·马吉德发出强烈警告：伊朗的南部邻国应该知道，如果他们的地理位置和设施被敌人用来攻击伊朗，他们必须告别中东地区的石油生产。视频：……” 🇮🇷 对于那些观看了我们周日直播并想知道克里斯要去哪里的观众……这就是答案，用他自己的话说：“37年来，我第一次回到伊朗的家！” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇷🇮🇱 Argentinian president Javier Milei abruptly left the Israeli Independence Day ceremony before his expected departure. No official reason was given for his sudden departure. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee has been ordered back to the United States for "consultations" at the White House, against the backdrop of developments with Iran and ahead of negotiations with Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇷🇮🇱 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱在以色列独立日庆典结束前突然离开，早于预期。官方未给出他突然离开的原因。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：美国驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比已被召回美国，在白宫进行“磋商”，背景是伊朗局势的发展以及与黎巴嫩谈判的前夕。 @wfwitness

text: French President Macron: France does not need to be at a table, wherever it may be, to stand by Lebanon.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：法国不需要坐在任何谈判桌前，无论在哪里，都能支持黎巴嫩。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s ambassador to the United Nations Amir-Saeid Iravani said Tehran has received signals that the United States is prepared to remove the naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗常驻联合国代表阿米尔-赛义德·伊拉瓦尼表示，德黑兰已收到信号，称美国准备解除对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran Supreme Leader's Representative to the IRGC, Abdollah Haji Sadeghi: "For now, there are no negotiations... We will negotiate whenever the enemy accepts our conditions." "The enemy must accept that we are in a position of victory and that it is in a position of defeat." "Our people are perceptive; whenever, with the guidance of the leadership, our battlefield shifts from the missile field to the field of negotiation, the people will support it." "Our people are a people of logic and reasoning, and loyal to the leadership; wherever and in whatever arena necessary, they have stood against arrogance." – Mehr News 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗最高领袖驻伊斯兰革命卫队代表阿卜杜拉·哈吉·萨德吉：“目前还没有谈判……只要敌人接受我们的条件，我们就会进行谈判。”“敌人必须接受我们处于胜利地位，而他们处于失败地位。”“我们的人民是有洞察力的；每当在领袖的指导下，我们的战场从导弹领域转向谈判领域时，人民都会支持它。”“我们的人民是讲逻辑和道理的人民，忠于领袖；无论在什么领域，只要有必要，他们都站在了傲慢的对立面。” – 梅赫尔通讯社 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 WSJ : U.S. Vice President JD Vance has paused plans to travel to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran, after a flurry of White House meetings. While he could still leave later this week, U.S. President Trump is privately discussing cancelling the trip altogether, citing Tehran’s unwillingness to concede on nuclear enrichment demands and its failure to commit to a meeting. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 《华尔街日报》：美国副总统万斯在白宫举行了一系列会议后，暂停了前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行谈判的计划。虽然他本周晚些时候仍可能出发，但美国总统特朗普正在私下讨论完全取消此次行程，理由是德黑兰不愿在核浓缩要求上让步，且未能承诺参加会议。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner arrive at the White House. - CNN https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046665647833202697/photo/1 Secretary Rubio and Secretary Hegseth are at the White House with Vice President JD Vance and President Trump, according to CNN. Vance has still not departed for Pakistan as Iran continues to stall on negotiations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046642543442444434/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳抵达白宫。 - CNN https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046665647833202697/photo/1 据CNN报道，鲁比奥部长和赫格塞斯部长正在白宫与万斯副总统和特朗普总统会面。由于伊朗继续拖延谈判，万斯尚未启程前往巴基斯坦。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046642543442444434/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender Following reports that U.S. Vice President JD Vance arrived at the White House for a policy meeting on Iran, CNN has said that in the past two hours, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth, Jared Kushner, and White House Special Envoy to the Middle East Steve Witkoff have all been viewed entering the White House. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：继有报道称美国副总统万斯抵达白宫参加伊朗政策会议后，CNN表示，在过去两个小时内，国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥、战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯、贾里德·库什纳和白宫中东问题特使史蒂夫·威特科夫都被看到进入了白宫。推文

text: WarMonitor Once you open that door, everyone’s going to want in. NEW: Trump administration is considering financial bailout for the United Arab Emirates over economic losses sustained from US war with Iran. -WSJ - Dominic Michael Tripi tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：一旦你打开那扇门，每个人都会想进来。最新消息：特朗普政府正在考虑对阿拉伯联合酋长国进行经济救助，以弥补其因美国与伊朗战争而遭受的经济损失。 -《华尔街日报》 - 多米尼克·迈克尔·特里皮推文

text: Open Source Intel For every Hezbollah attack, Israel should move the yellow line in southern Lebanon further north. NEW 🔴 Hezbollah says it launched rockets at Israel on Tuesday in response to “Israel’s ceasefire violations.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：对于每一次真主党的袭击，以色列都应该将黎巴嫩南部的黄线进一步向北移动。最新消息 🔴 真主党表示，周二向以色列发射火箭弹，以回应“以色列违反停火协议”。 - 开源情报推文

text: French President Macron: We have clearly condemned what has been done in Gaza… the violation of Lebanon’s territorial sovereignty… This context makes it legitimate to question the future of the association agreement. And it is obvious that if Israel continues this policy… we cannot act as if nothing is happening.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：我们明确谴责了在加沙所做的一切……对黎巴嫩领土主权的侵犯……这种背景使得质疑联系国协议的未来变得合情合理。显而易见，如果以色列继续这种政策……我们不能表现得好像什么都没发生一样。

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Hezbollah says it launched rockets at Israel on Tuesday in response to “Israel’s ceasefire violations.” tweet

text: OSINTdefender Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi has said that the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is “an act of war and thus a violation of the ceasefire,” as U.S.-Iran talks are currently on hold. This, as the nominal ceasefire agreement is set to expire with no agreement on its continuation in the coming hours. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁是“战争行为，因此违反了停火协议”，目前美伊谈判处于暂停状态。与此同时，名义上的停火协议即将到期，且在未来几个小时内尚未就续签达成一致。推文

text: Instant News Alerts NEW: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports was an "act of war" and thus a violation of the ceasefire. (Reuters) tweet
text_zh: 即时新闻快讯：最新消息：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，美国对伊朗港口的封锁是“战争行为”，因此违反了停火协议。（路透社）推文
